uica.description: Generates frontend UI components from ASP.NET Core controllers. Use when creating forms, tables, or CRUD pages for controller endpoints.

uica-generate.description: Generate full CRUD UI for a controller
uica-generate.template: Generate a complete CRUD UI for the $ARGUMENTS controller: index table, create/edit form, detail view, delete dialog, and API client. First check if the controller has changed since last generation.

uica-form.description: Generate a validated form for a controller action
uica-form.template: Generate a create/edit form for the $ARGUMENTS controller action. Include field validation matching the .NET Data Annotations. First check if the controller has changed since last generation.

uica-table.description: Generate a data table for a controller index
uica-table.template: Generate a paginated, sortable data table for the $ARGUMENTS controller index endpoint. Include search, filters, and row actions. First check if the controller has changed since last generation.

uica-diff.description: Check if a controller has changed and needs UI regeneration
uica-diff.template: Check whether the $ARGUMENTS controller has changed since the last UI generation. Compare current source files with the stored snapshot. Report what changed and which UI components need regeneration.
